assessment.note: He links uncertainty to help-seeking risk — worrying about sounding slow suggests a strong clarity gap around expectations and safety asking questions.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Help-seeking safety
new_queue.name: What makes it easiest or hardest to ask for help here?
new_queue.description: Explores whether he feels safe surfacing questions or blockers without making it a complaint.

new_queue.label: Requirements churn
new_queue.name: What part of the shifting requirements has been hardest to work with?
new_queue.description: Separates the churn itself from decision ownership or tradeoff problems.

new_queue.label: Steadier next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into immediate support and next steps.
